state_machine._comment_respawn_confirm_frames: Consecutive frames the respawn hint must persist before switching TO the video.
state_machine._comment_result_confirm_frames: Consecutive frames 胜利/战败 must persist before switching back to the game.
state_machine._comment_respawn_absent_frames: Consecutive frames the respawn hint must be GONE before switching back. Fires when you are alive again (respawned next round, or round/match ended). Keep high enough that a momentary OCR flicker or the '炸弹已被安装' banner (treated as still-dead) cannot trigger a premature switch-back. 20 @ 10fps ~= 2s.

companion._comment_url: Any web page opened while you are dead (a 'companion' page for downtime). Video sites (Douyin/Bilibili/Kuaishou) get play/pause control; ANY other site (Xiaohongshu, a blog, an academic page) just opens and is shown/hidden with no side effects. Presets: Douyin https://www.douyin.com | Bilibili https://www.bilibili.com | Kuaishou https://www.kuaishou.com. Empty string disables companion switching entirely (you drive the page yourself).
companion._comment_app_mode: true = open in Chrome app mode (borderless dedicated window, no address bar/tabs). false = normal browser window (--new-window).
companion._comment_fullscreen: true = maximize the companion window on show (fullscreen-window mode).
companion._comment_browser_path: Optional explicit chrome.exe / msedge.exe path. Empty = 'chrome.exe' on PATH with common install-location fallbacks.
